headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -79.9)
key_insights: Fears trending up 43% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 113 quotes and 79 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 56.3 sits in the middle of its 114-day range, suggesting this level of venting is fairly typical for the period.

• Fears improved significantly from yesterday's low while optimism remains deeply negative despite a slight uptick.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
